traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.description: Iarno is a 4th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). He has the following wizard spells prepared: Cantrips (at will): light, mage hand, shocking grasp. 1st level (4 slots): charm person, magic missile, shield. 2nd level (3 slots): hold person, misty step.

traits.name: Staff of Defense
traits.description: Iarno wields a staff of defense that grants him AC 13 (mage armor). He can use the staff to cast mage armor (1 charge) or shield (2 charges). The staff has 10 charges.

actions.name: Quarterstaff (Staff of Defense)
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d6 - 1) bludgeoning damage.
